form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation second last of 14 at Riccarton Park in the G3 Canterbury Breeders Stakes November 8 over 1400m, 7 len behind Captured By Love with 56kg at $80.10. First up last campaign seventh of 14 at Oamaru July 20 over 1200m, in the wet; 4 len behind Candle carrying 57kg at $7.40. See how she returns.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of three months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation seventh of 9 at Otaki January 9 over 1600m, 4 len behind Procul Boy with 58kg at $7.50. Previously first up; second of 12 at Tauherenikau December 10 over 1600m, soft track; 1.5 len behind Psyclone carrying 57.5kg at $7.80. Expecting a positive return.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months won by 1.1 len at Wanganui March 14 over 1200m in soft going defeating Scouser with 56.5kg at $8.40. Previously second-up 3rd of 14 at Wanganui on June 14 over 1340m, on rain affected going; 1.2 len behind Knock Off with 59.5kg at $3.20. In the money when second up in the past and can add to that record today.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign 14th of 18 at Ellerslie December 26 over 2400m, soft track; 14 len behind Maldini with 57.5kg at $80.20. Previously first up; third of 14 at Tauranga November 1 over 1600m, soft track; a long neck behind Bourbon Proof with 58.5kg at $22.90. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up favourite; came home strongly from last on the turn and won by 1.75 len at Otaki February 21 over 1200m in soft going defeating Shacktime with 57.5kg at $4.70. Second run from a spell second last of 9 at Trentham on March 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind She's All That with 55kg at $4.40. Can atone.

form.formComment: At the latest run tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 11 at Trentham on March 21 over 1400m, slow going 2.5 len behind Riverplate carrying 54.5kg at $8.20. Before that 9th of 14 at Tauranga on February 5 over 1400m, slow going 3.5 len behind Dramatic Miss with 55kg at $34.40. Working up to a win. Great chance to atone.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at Awapuni Synthetic August 24 over 1200m, 9 len behind Our Akashinga with 54kg at $45. Previously first up; second last of 8 at Awapuni Synthetic May 25 over 1000m, 12 len behind Ka Ying Lucky carrying 55kg at $12.30. Will be better for this run.
